name: latex
description: Renders LaTeX math expressions using KaTeX. Supports $...$ (inline) and $$...$$ (block) delimiters.

activation.description: Add 'latex' to the visualizers list in _bloob-settings.md or sites/*.yaml. Themes can default it on via theme.yaml visualizer_defaults.

throw_on_error.description: If true, KaTeX throws on parse errors instead of rendering a fallback

notes.cdn: Loads KaTeX 0.16.9 from jsDelivr CDN at runtime. No npm install needed.
notes.delimiters: Supports $$...$$  (display/block) and $...$ (inline). Both are enabled by default.
